This module provides:\n    - Audio file transcription\n    - Fallback for browsers without Web Speech API\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # whisper-stt service URL (Tailscale mesh)\n    # Configurable via ADC_WHISPER_STT_URL env var\n    DEFAULT_STT_URL = \"https://whisper.ardenone.com\"\n\n    def __init__(self, stt_url: str | None = None):\n        self.stt_url = stt_url or os.getenv(\"ADC_WHISPER_STT_URL\", self.DEFAULT_STT_URL)\n        self._is_available = None  # None = unknown, True = available, False = unavailable\n        self._failure_count = 0\n\n    async def transcribe(\n        self,\n        audio_data: bytes,\n        audio_format: str = \"webm\",\n    ) -> Optional[str]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Transcribe audio data to text using whisper-stt.\n\n        Args:\n            audio_data: Raw audio bytes (webm/opus format from MediaRecorder)\n            audio_format: Audio format hint (default: \"webm\")\n\n        Returns:\n            Transcribed text, or None if transcription failed.\n\n        Raises:\n            httpx.RequestError: If the request fails\n            httpx.HTTPStatusError: If the request returns an error status\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            #       }\n\n        function formatStaleness(seconds) {\n            if (seconds < 60) return 'just now';\n            if (seconds < 3600) return `${Math.floor(seconds / 60)}m ago`;\n            if (seconds < 86400) return `${Math.floor(seconds / 3600)}h ago`;\n            return `${Math.floor(seconds / 86400)}d ago`;\n        }\n\n        function getStalenessLevel(seconds) {\n            if (seconds < 600) return 'fresh';      // 10 minutes\n            if (seconds < 3600) return 'stale';     // 1 hour\n            return 'very-stale';\n        }\n\n        function createTopicCard(cardData) {\n            const topic = cardData.topic;\n            const staleness = cardData.staleness;\n            const latestResult = cardData.latest_result;\n\n            const card = document.createElement('div');\n            card.className = 'topic-card';\n            card.dataset.topicId = topic.id;\n\n            const stalenessLevel = getStalenessLevel(staleness.seconds);\n            card.classList.add(stalenessLevel);\n\n            const typeClass = topic.type || 'adhoc';\n\n            let html = `\n                <div class=\"topic-header\">\n                    <div class=\"topic-label\">${escapeHtml(topic.label)}</div>\n                    <div>\n                        <span class=\"topic-type ${typeClass}\">${topic.type || 'adhoc'}</span>\n                        ${stalenessLevel !== 'fresh' ? `<span class=\"stale-badge ${stalenessLevel}\">STALE</span>` : ''}\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            `;\n\n            // Add latest result if available\n            if (latestResult) {\n                const urgencyClass = latestResult.urgency || 'normal';\n                html += `\n                    <div class=\"result-content\">\n                        <div class=\"result-summary\">\n                            ${escapeHtml(latestResult.summary)}\n                            <span class=\"urgency-badge ${urgencyClass}\">${urgencyClass}</span>\n                        </div>\n                `;\n\n                if (latestResult.data) {\n                    html += `<div class=\"result-data\">${escapeHtml(JSON.stringify(latestResult.data, null, 2))}</div>`;\n                }\n\n                html += `</div>`;\n            }\n\n            // Add <span class=\"staleness-dot ${stalenessLevel}\"></span>\n                    <span>Updated ${timeAgo}</span>\n                </div>\n            `;\n\n            card.innerHTML = html;\n            return card;\n        }\n\n        function escapeHtml(text) {\n            const div = document.createElement('div');\n            div.textContent = text;\n            return div.innerHTML;\n        }\n\n        function updateConnectionStatus(status, text) {\n            const dot = document.getElementById('statusDot');\n            const statusText = document.getElementById('statusText');\n\n            dot.className = 'status-dot ' + status;\n            statusText.textContent = text;\n        }\n\n        function showWorkloadSummary(summary) {\n            const el = document.getElementById('workloadSummary');\n            const parts = [];\n\n            if (summary.pending_intents > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.pending_intents}</strong> pending intents`);\n            }\n            if (summary.new_results > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.new_results}</strong> new results`);\n            }\n            if (summary.unresolved_exceptions > 0) {\n                parts.push(`<strong>${summary.unresolved_exceptions}</strong> unresolved exceptions`);\n            }\n\n            if (parts.length > 0) {\n                el.innerHTML = '📊 While you were away: ' + parts.join(', ');\n                el.classList.add('show');\n            } else {\n                el.classList.remove('show');\n            }\n        }\n\n        async function registerSurface() {\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/register', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({\n                        session_id: sessionId,\n                        surface_type: surfaceType\n                    })\n                });\n\n                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to register surface');\n\n                const data = await response.json();\n                surfaceId = data.surface_id;\n                return surfaceId;\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error registering surface:', error);\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        async function loadTopics() {\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch(`/api/v1/sessions/${sessionId}/topics`);\n                if (!response.ok) return;\n\n                const data = await response.json();\n                const container = document.getElementById('topicsContainer');\n\n                if (!data.cards || data.cards.length === 0) {\n                    container.innerHTML = `\n                        <div class=\"empty-state\">\n                            <h2>No active topics</h2>\n                            <p>Topics will appear here as you interact with ADC.</p>\n                        </div>\n                    `;\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                container.innerHTML = '';\n                data.cards.forEach(cardData => {\n                    container.appendChild(createTopicCard(cardData));\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Error loading topics:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        function connectSSE() {\n            updateConnectionStatus('connecting', 'Connecting...');\n\n            const url = `/api/v1/sse?surface_id=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceId)}&session_id=${encodeURIComponent(sessionId)}&surface_type=${encodeURIComponent(surfaceType)}`;\n            eventSource = new EventSource(url);\n\n            eventSource.onopen = () => {\n                updateConnectionStatus('', 'Connected');\n                loadTopics();\n            };\n\n            eventSource.onerror = (error) => {\n                console.error('SSE error:', error);\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n            };\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('connected', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('SSE connected:', data);\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('workload_summary', (event) => {\n                const summary = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                showWorkloadSummary(summary);\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('result_created', (event) => {\n                const result = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('New result:', result);\n                loadTopics(); // Reload topics to show new result\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('topic_updated', (event) => {\n                const topic = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Topic updated:', topic);\n                loadTopics();\n            });\n\n            eventSource.addEventListener('disconnect', (event) => {\n                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);\n                console.log('Server disconnect:', data);\n                updateConnectionStatus('disconnected', 'Disconnected');\n                eventSource.close();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Heartbeat to keep surface alive\n        setInterval(() => {\n            if (surfaceId) {\n                fetch('/api/v1/surfaces/heartbeat', {\n textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n            btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n        });\n\n        // Send on Enter (Shift+Enter = newline)\n        textarea.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                if (!btnSend.disabled) dispatch(textarea.value.trim());\n            }\n        });\n\n        btnSend.addEventListener('click', () => {\n            if (!btnSend.disabled) dispatch(textarea.value.trim());\n        });\n\n        async function dispatch(utterance) {\n            if (!utterance) return;\n            textarea.value = '';\n            textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n            btnSend.disabled = true;\n\n            try {\n                const resp = await fetch('/dispatch', {\n                    method: 'POST',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({ utterance, session_id: sessionId, surface_id: surfaceId }),\n                });\n                if (!resp.ok) {\n                    const err = await resp.text();\n                    console.error('Dispatch error:', err);\n                }\n            } catch (err) {\n                console.error('Dispatch failed:', err);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Web Speech API mic\n        let recognition = null;\n\n        if ('webkitSpeechRecognition' in window || 'SpeechRecognition' in window) {\n            const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;\n            recognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n            recognition.continuous = false;\n            recognition.interimResults = true;\n            recognition.lang = 'en-US';\n\n            let finalTranscript = '';\n\n            recognition.onstart = () => {\n                btnMic.classList.add('recording');\n                finalTranscript = textarea.value;\n            };\n\n            recognition.onresult = (e) => {\n                let interim = '';\n                for (let i = e.resultIndex; i < e.results.length; i++) {\n                    if (e.results[i].isFinal) {\n                        finalTranscript += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n                    } else {\n                        interim += e.results[i][0].transcript;\n                    }\n                }\n                textarea.value = finalTranscript + interim;\n                textarea.style.height = 'auto';\n                textarea.style.height = Math.min(textarea.scrollHeight, 160) + 'px';\n                btnSend.disabled = textarea.value.trim().length === 0;\n            };\n\n            recognition.onend = () => {\n                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n                if (finalTranscript.trim()) dispatch(finalTranscript.trim());\n            };\n\n            recognition.onerror = (e) => {\n                console.error('Speech recognition error:', e.error);\n                btnMic.classList.remove('recording');\n            };\n\n            btnMic.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                if (btnMic.classList.contains('recording')) {\n                    recognition.stop();\n                } else {\n                    recognition.start();\n                }\n            });\n        } else {\n            btnMic.title = 'Voice input not supported in this browser';\n            btnMic.style.opacity = '0.4';\n            btnMic.disabled = true;\n        }\n\n        // ── Initialize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n        // Initialize\n        async function init() {\n            try {\n                // Show version\n
